# Decisions (ADR-lite)

Architectural and tooling decisions with their rationale. Never silently contradict an entry — propose a new decision instead. Entry format below. See `../MEMORY.md`.

```markdown
- **[Decision title]** — What was decided. Why (1 line). Alternatives rejected: X, Y. (YYYY-MM-DD)
```

## Decisions

<!-- Example:
- **State via createGlobalState** — Use VueUse createGlobalState, not Pinia. Lighter, no plugin setup. Rejected: Pinia (extra dependency). (2026-01-15)
-->
